rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §37.052, which governs cooperative programs between school districts and state youth agencies for delinquent conduct. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 37.052. COOPERATIVE PROGRAMS. The board of trustees of a school district may develop cooperative programs with state youth agencies for children found to have engaged in delinquent conduct.
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses an entirely separate subject matter from the proposed change.
